# The Cumulus Community

## Freely Choosing Cooperative Efficiency

**The Cumulus Community has two sister corporations as its foundation to contribute to solving
modern polycrisis: one for profit, the other not.**

1. Our LLC, [_SubtleTea Solutions (STS)_](https://subtleteasolutions.com), is a
   computational and organizational science services company dedicated to
   realizing lucrative yet sustainable business models.
2. Our nonprofit, the [_Generation of Participation in Democracy
   (GPD)_](https://gpdamericas.org), is a California Public Benefit Corporation
in compliance with California Department of Justice registration. We are
awaiting the GPD's 501(c)(3) tax-exempt status determination; **EIN: 41-4992916**.
    - The GPD's first _Flagship Organization_ is the [_Instituto
      Dourados_](https://institutodourados.org). The _Instituto's_ mission is to
      provide computational epidemiological tools for public health planning
      that will be owned, maintained, and further developed by Indigenous
      communities in the _Grande Dourados_ region in Mato Grosso do Sul, Brazil,
      and beyond.


![](images/matty-linkedin-banner.png){fig-align="center" width=525px
style="margin-top: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px;"}

## Board of Directors

Our directors serve identical roles at both GPD and STS. This is temporary
scaffolding as we continue to identify and fill key roles.

The current board will remain as Community leadership for the foreseeable future,
but specific roles within organizations will be adjusted as necessary for
success.

One of the key goals for Q3 and Q4 of 2026 is to establish a policy for a
directional "air gap" so that money from the nonprofit (GPD) never flows to the
for profit (STS). Consolidated leadership will oversee this project to
completion.


### Matthew A. Turner, PhD <span class=role>President</span>

![](images/MatthewTurner.png){.member-photo}

Dr. Matt Turner is the Founder and President of the Generation of Participation in
Democracy and SubtleTea Solutions. His mission is to
help his and his colleagues' innovative basic research live up to its full
potential for lasting, positive real world impact, simultaneously creating value
for customers and investors alike.

In a typical day, Dr. Turner might work on new coursework and writing, publishing
new content to be included in a forthcoming book, _Quantitative Social Science
for Sustainable Futures_. Or he is creating scientific hardware and software,
publishing websites, or organizing and executing all business details across
both organizations. He is currently the sole responsible party for all tax and
compliance issues at both GPD and STS.

[Dr. Turner's website](https://mat.phd)

### Izabela Mauricio de Rezende, PhD <span class=role>Secretary</span>

![](images/IzabelaRezende.png){.member-photo}

Dr. Izabela Rezende is the Founder and Director of Instituto Dourados, the
inaugural Flagship Institute of the GPD.

Dr. Rezende will ensure that we deliver on our promise to serve the Indigenous
peoples of Dourados, and public health policy improvement in general. She will
further ensure SubtleTea Solutions contributes to the greater good while
maintaining its focus making excellent products for our customers, and
making sustainability lucrative for investors.

[Dr. Rezende on LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/izabela-rezende/)

### Joshua Rueckheim, MBA <span class=role>Treasurer</span>

![](images/JoshuaRueckheim.png){.member-photo}

Joshua Rueckheim oversees book keeping, develops controls and
ensures enforcement, and assists with structuring and executing
forecasts and other business processes. Mr. Rueckheim
applies his decades of expertise in business management to ensure the
financial integrity of the Cumulus Community's organizations.


Mr. Rueckheim is currently Finance Director for the Philadelphia Hospitality
Investment Levy and for [Alta Management
Services](https://www.altamsi.com/our-team/). Before joining Alta, Mr. Rueckheim
worked for Mariott International for 10 years in various finance and
accounting roles.

[Mr. Rueckheim on LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/joshua-rueckheim-96241226/)


## Strategic Organization and Communication {style="margin-top: 25px;"}

We focus on developing an approach to social change that strategically
balances economic cooperation and competition, guided by a new
integrative approach to social science.

We are staunchly anti-ideology. We will never seek to force conformity.

Our
system is founded on the belief that all people should be free to choose for
themselves based on their own self interest. Education, therefore, is essential
so that one can independently confirm that they _chose_ what they want, which
requires knowing how to tell good from bad in an ever more complex world.

In the Cumulus Community we focus on developing beneficial practices as antidotes
to occupy the cultural niche otherwise occupied by relatively harmful ones.
Democratic change tends to focus on influencing and winning elections,
petitioning government, protest, and other overt forms of struggle.

Our operating hypothesis takes a different approach: we believe we can each
do better individually if we design and willingly adopt strategic social
coordination policies.

---


<br>


{{< include _footer.qmd >}}
